label: NewsAPI
description: Fetch aggregated news headlines and full articles from thousands of sources via the NewsAPI.org service.

form.title: Connect NewsAPI
form.subtitle: Paste your NewsAPI key to start pulling headlines and articles from thousands of global sources.

methods.label: API Key
methods.description: Paste your NewsAPI key directly — no OAuth flow, no credentials to manage. Grab the key from your newsapi.org account dashboard and you're ready in seconds.
methods.how_to:
## Get your NewsAPI key

1. Go to [newsapi.org](https://newsapi.org) and sign in (or create a free account).
2. After logging in, click your account name in the top-right corner and select **Account** from the dropdown.
3. Your API key is displayed on the **Account** page under the **API Key** section. Copy it.
4. Paste the key into the **API Key** field below and click **Submit**.

## Notes

- Free-tier keys are limited to 100 requests per day and return articles up to 30 days old. Upgrade your plan at newsapi.org for higher limits and real-time articles.
- Developer (free) plan results are delayed by ~15 minutes and restricted to 20 sources per query.
- The key is shown persistently on the Account page — you can return any time to copy it again.
- If you suspect your key has been compromised, contact NewsAPI support to rotate it.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Your NewsAPI key from newsapi.org → Account → API Key. It is a 32-character hex string.
